calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Richard J. Alexander, Esq., for the Plaintiff FRIENDSHIP VILLAGE, INC.
Allen Nunley sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant DORIS WHITTENBERG.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 940 Fillmore Street, Apt. C, San Francisco, CA 94117
Past-due rent $235.00
Holdover damages $579.42
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $390.00
for a Total Judgment of $1,204.42
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Friendship Village, Inc. is present. Represented by
Attorney Richard J. Alexander is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Doris Whittenberg is NOT present.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of January 13, 2014 remains on calendar.
